name: Cheesy Spinach Bake
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Pkg frozen chopped spinach (Thawed and well drained)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Grease an 8 inch square pan.
Combine ricotta, spinach, Mozzarella, wheat germ, eggs, onion, Parmesan and nutmeg in a bowl until well mixed.
Spread the mixture into the prepared pan.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until heated through. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
Cut into squares measuring 2 1/2 inches each.
If desired, sprinkle with additional wheat germ before serving.
